## Description

Describe your changes here. If adding resources, please summarize what you are adding and why they are valuable.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New resource addition
- [ ] Broken link fix
- [ ] Formatting/Documentation improvement
- [ ] New section suggestion

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines.
- [ ] All links have been verified and are working.
- [ ] Resources are placed in the correct sections.
- [ ] No duplicates of existing resources.
- [ ] Pricing details are included for SaaS/platform resources (if applicable).
